free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 362 MeV polarized
protons from 40Ca
. Polarization about 70%.
Natural calcium target, 25 mg/cm**2 thickness for
forward angles less 18 degrees, and 50 mg/cm**2 for
larger angles.
Medium Resolution Spectrometer (MRS)
consisting of a front-end wire chamber at target
chamber exit and two drift chambers at dipole exit,
follwoed by an array of 10 plastic scintillators.
Using CH2 target.
In beam polarameter used measure beam polarization
and intensity.
Statistical uncertainties given.
Approved by S.M. Wong, 27 September 2001.
VM. Converted from data set O0275 (CaJaD)
and updated.
Data received from author by B. Clark.
Data received from author by B. Clark.
Data received by email from S.M. Wong, 29 August 2001.
